---
title: My dynamic report
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)

```

```{css}
h2 { color: #2C3E50; }
h3 { color: #34495E; }
body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }
```

## Video Ad Observational Log

This report tracks the duration, category, and platform of video ads observed over a period of time to analyze ad targeting patterns.

```{r data-processing}
library(tidyverse)

logged_data <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSiM8F7-aJbglX-NMVXyOHHNrsePJy--w0ri93hw29IIaHvyePpGyko-AruIjQ-sCGJQ1qdLCikVwrU/pub?gid=1051762404&single=true&output=csv")

latest_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(
    duration_sec = `What was the exact duration of the video ad in seconds?`,
    ad_category = `Which of the following best describes the primary industry or product category of the ad?`,
    platform = `On which platform did you encounter this ad?`
  )

total_n <- nrow(latest_data)
avg_len <- round(mean(latest_data$duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
```

### Summary Statistics
Based on the collected data, I recorded a total of `r total_n` ad observations. The average duration of these video ads was `r avg_len` seconds.

### Ad Categories
```{r plot-category}
ggplot(data = latest_data, aes(x = ad_category)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Frequency of Ad Categories", x = "Category", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Ad Platforms
```{r plot-platform}
ggplot(data = latest_data, aes(x = platform)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "coral") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Ad Platforms", x = "Platform", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```
